indication: ADCETRIS is indicated for adult patients with previously untreated CD30+ Stage III or IV Hodgkin lymphoma (HL) in combination with doxorubicin, vinblastine and dacarbazine (AVD).
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized brentuximab vedotin in combination with doxorubicin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine for the treatment of adult patients with previously untreated CD30+ stage III or IV Hodgkin lymphoma (HL).
raw_therapeutics: Adcetris (brentuximab vedotin) in combination with doxorubicin, vinblastine, and dacarbazine

document.name: Adcetris (brentuximab vedotin) [product information]. EMA.
